title: astragalus ochranthus
intro: Astragalus ochranthus, also known as Ochrab, is a type of flowering plant in the pea family, native to Central Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, immunomodulatory, and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing the severity of colds and flu, improving cardiovascular health, and enhancing immune function. Astragalus ochranthus can be prepared as a herbal supplement, tea, or extract, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
